productName: M-MT-300ENG - Moxey Energize 1:1:1 Peppermints (100mg CBC/100mg CBG/100mg THC)
description: Polished confectioner-style mints with a cool, refreshing finish, the kind you could imagine being pressed in small batches by an old-school candy maker. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift, CBG to support daytime focus and clarity, and CBC to round out the full-plant entourage effect in a 1:1:1 ratio. For an uplifting, energetic experience.
